pages.text: $(thing)Fishing Nets$() are passive catch systems stretched between two anchors near water.
Craft net segments and anchors from jute fiber (and stone for anchors).

pages.title: Placement
pages.text: Place two $(thing)Fishing Net Anchors$() at the same Y level on a straight axis, then shift-right-click each anchor with a Fishing Net to span segments between them.

pages.title: Retrieval
pages.text: Right-click an anchor with empty hand to collect stored fish.$(br2)Shift-right-click an anchor to recover deployed net segments. Breaking anchors also removes attached segments.

pages.name: Fishing Net
pages.text: Concept layout. Real spans can extend much farther.
